verses.title: Assurance of Salvation
verses.verse: And this is the testimony: God has given us eternal life, and this life is in his Son. He who has the Son has life; he who does not have the Son of God does not have life.

verses.title: Assurance of Answered Prayer
verses.verse: "Until now you have not asked for anything in my name. Ask and you will receive, and your joy will be complete."

verses.title: Assurance of Victory
verses.verse: No temptation has seized you except what is common to man. And God is faithful; he will not let you be tempted beyond what you can bear. But when you are tempted, he will also provide a way out so that you can stand up under it.

verses.title: Assurance of Forgiveness
verses.verse: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just and will forgive us our sins and purify us from all unrighteousness

verses.title: Assurance of Guidance
verses.verse: Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding; in all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make your paths straight.

verses.title: Christ the Center
verses.verse: Therefore, if anyone is in Christ, he is a new creation; the old has gone, the new has come!

verses.title: Christ the Center
verses.verse: I have been crucified with Christ and I no longer live, but Christ lives in me. The life I live in the body, I live by faith in the Son of God, who loved me and gave Himself for me.

verses.title: Obedience to Christ
verses.verse: Therefore, I urge you, brothers, in view of God's mercy to offer your bodies as living sacrifices, holy and pleasing to God - this is your spiritual act of worship.

verses.title: Obedience to Christ
verses.verse: Whoever has My commands and obeys them, he is the one who loves Me. He who loves Me will be loved by My Father, and I too will love him and show Myself to him.

verses.title: The Word
verses.verse: All Scripture is God-breathed and is useful for teaching, rebuking, correcting and training in righteousness.

verses.title: The Word
verses.verse: Do not let this Book of the Law depart from your mouth; meditate on it day and night, so that you may be careful to do everything written in it. Then you will be prosperous and successful.

verses.title: Prayer
verses.verse: Do not be anxious about anything, but in everything, by prayer and petition, with thanksgiving, present your requests to God. And the peace of God, which transcends all understanding, will guard your hearts and your minds in Christ Jesus.

verses.title: Prayer
verses.verse: If you remain in Me and My words remain in you, ask whatever you wish, and it will be given you.

verses.title: Fellowship
verses.verse: For where two or three come together in My name, there am I with them.

verses.title: Fellowship
verses.verse: And let us consider how we may spur one another on toward love and good deeds. Let us not give up meeting together, as some are in the habit of doing, but let us encourage one another - and all the more as you see the Day approaching.

verses.title: Witnessing
verses.verse: "Come, follow Me," Jesus said, "and I will make you fishers of men."

verses.title: Witnessing
verses.verse: I am not ashamed of the gospel, because it is the power of God for the salvation of everyone who believes: first for the Jew, then for the Gentile.

verses.title: All Have Sinned
verses.verse: For all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God.

verses.title: All Have Sinned
verses.verse: We all, like sheep, have gone astray, each of us has turned to his own way; and the Lord has laid on Him the iniquity of us all.

verses.title: Sin's Penalty
verses.verse: For the wages of sin is death, but the gift of God is eternal life in Christ Jesus our Lord.

verses.title: Sin's Penalty
verses.verse: Just as man is destined to die once, and after that to face judgment.

verses.title: Christ Paid the Penalty
verses.verse: But God demonstrates his own love for us in this: While we were still sinners, Christ died for us.

verses.title: Christ Paid the Penalty
verses.verse: For Christ died for sins once for all, the righteous for the unrighteous, to bring you to God. He was put to death in the body but made alive by the Spirit.

verses.title: Salvation Not by Works
verses.verse: For it is by grace you have been saved, through faith- and this not from yourselves, it is the gift of God- not by works, so that no one can boast.

verses.title: Salvation Not by Works
verses.verse: He saved us, not because of righteous things we had done, but because of His mercy. He saved us through the washing of rebirth and renewal by the Holy Spirit.

verses.title: Must Receive Christ
verses.verse: Yet to all who received Him, to those who believed in His name, He gave the right to become children of God.

verses.title: Must Receive Christ
verses.verse: Here I am! I stand at the door and knock. If anyone hears My voice and opens the door, I will come in and eat with him, and he with Me.

verses.title: Assurance of Salvation
verses.verse: I write these things to you who believe in the name of the Son of God so that you may know that you have eternal life.

verses.title: Assurance of Salvation
verses.verse: I tell you the truth, whoever hears My word and believes Him who sent Me has eternal life and will not be condemned; he has crossed over from death to life.

verses.title: His Spirit
verses.verse: Don't you know that you yourselves are God's temple and that God's Spirit lives in you?

verses.title: His Spirit
verses.verse: We have not received the spirit of the world but the Spirit who is from God, that we may understand what God has freely given us.

verses.title: His Strength
verses.verse: So do not fear, for I am with you; do not be dismayed, for I am your God. I will strengthen you and help you; I will uphold you with My righteous right hand.

verses.title: His Strength
verses.verse: I can do everything through Him who gives me strength.

verses.title: His Faithfulness
verses.verse: Because of the Lord's great love we are not consumed, for His compassions never fail. They are new every morning; great is Your faithfulness.

verses.title: His Faithfulness
verses.verse: God is not a man, that He should lie, nor a son of man, that He should change His mind. Does He speak and then not act? Does he promise and not fulfil?

verses.title: His Peace
verses.verse: You will keep in perfect peace him whose mind is steadfast, because he trusts in You.

verses.title: His Peace
verses.verse: Cast all your anxiety on Him because He cares for you.

verses.title: His Provision
verses.verse: He who did not spare His own Son, but gave Him up for us all- how will He not also, along with Him, graciously give us all things?

verses.title: His Provision
verses.verse: And my God will meet all your needs according to His glorious riches in Christ Jesus.

verses.title: His Help in Temptation
verses.verse: Because he Himself suffered when He was tempted. He is able to help those who are being tempted.

verses.title: His Help in Temptation
verses.verse: How can a young man keep his way pure? By living according to Your word. I have hidden Your word in my heart that I might not sin against you.

verses.title: Put Christ First
verses.verse: But seek first His kingdom and His righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well.

verses.title: Put Christ First
verses.verse: Then He said to them all: "If anyone would come after Me, he must deny himself and take up his cross daily and follow Me."

verses.title: Separate from the World
verses.verse: Do not love the world or anything in the world. If anyone loves the world, the love of the Father is not in him. For everything in the world- the cravings of sinful man, the lust of his eyes and the boasting of what he has and does- comes not from the Father but from the world.

verses.title: Separate from the World
verses.verse: Do not conform any longer to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind. Then you will be able to test and approve what God's will is- His good, pleasing and perfect will.

verses.title: Be Steadfast
verses.verse: Therefore, my dear brothers, stand firm. Let nothing move you. Always give yourselves fully to the work of the Lord, because you know that your labor in the Lord is not in vain.

verses.title: Be Steadfast
verses.verse: Consider Him who endured such opposition from sinful men, so that you will not grow weary and lose heart.

verses.title: Serve Others
verses.verse: For even the Son of Man did not come to be served, but to serve and to give His life as a ransom for many.

verses.title: Serve Others
verses.verse: For we do not preach ourselves, but Jesus Christ as Lord, and ourselves as your servants for Jesus' sake.

verses.title: Give Generously
verses.verse: Honor the Lord with your wealth, with the firstfruits of all your crops; then your barns will be filled to overflowing, and your vats will brim over with new wine.

verses.title: Give Generously
verses.verse: Remember this: Whoever sows sparingly will also reap sparingly, and whoever sows generously will also reap generously. Each man should give what he has decided in his heart to give, not reluctantly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver.

verses.title: Develop World Vision
verses.verse: But you will receive power when the Holy Spirit comes on you; and you will be My witnesses in Jerusalem, and in all Judea and Samaria, and to the ends of the earth.

verses.title: Develop World Vision
verses.verse: Therefore go and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit, and teaching them to obey everything I have commanded you. And surely I am with you always, to the very end of the age.

verses.title: Love
verses.verse: A new command I give you: Love one another. As I have loved you so you must love one another. By this all men will know that you are my disciples if you love one another.

verses.title: Love
verses.verse: Dear children, let us not love with words or tongue but with actions and in truth.

verses.title: Humility
verses.verse: Do nothing out of selfish ambition or vain conceit, but in humility consider others better than ourselves. Each of you should look not only to your own interests, but also to the interests of others.

verses.title: Humility
verses.verse: Young men, in the same way be submissive to those who are older. All of you, clothe yourselves with humility toward one another, because, "God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble." Humble yourselves, therefore, under God's mighty hand, that He may lift you up in due time.

verses.title: Purity
verses.verse: But among you there must not be even a hint of sexual immorality, or of any kind of impurity, or of greed, because these are improper for God's holy people.

verses.title: Purity
verses.verse: Dear friends, I urge you, as aliens and strangers in the world, to abstain from sinful desires, which war against your soul.

verses.title: Honesty
verses.verse: Do not steal. Do not lie. Do not deceive one another.

verses.title: Honesty
verses.verse: So I strive always to keep my conscience clear before God and man.

verses.title: Faith
verses.verse: And without faith, it is impossible to please God, because anyone who comes to Him must believe that He exists and that He rewards those who earnestly seek Him.

verses.title: Faith
verses.verse: Yet he did not waver through unbelief regarding the promise of God, but was strengthened in his faith and gave glory to God, being fully persuaded that God had power to do what he had promised.

verses.title: Good Works
verses.verse: Let us not become weary in doing good, for at the proper time we will reap a harvest if we do not give up. Therefore, as we have opportunity, let us do good to all people, especially to those who belong to the family of believers.

verses.title: Good Works
verses.verse: In the same way, let your light shine before men, that they may see your good deeds and praise your Father in heaven.

verses.title: Can be assured
verses.verse: Examine yourselves to see whether you are in the faith; test yourselves. Do you not realize that Christ Jesus is in you--unless, of course, you fail the test?

verses.title: Can be assured
verses.verse: And this is the testimony: God has given us eternal life, and this life is in his Son. He who has the Son has life; he who does not have the Son of God does not have life.

verses.title: Assured of having eternal life
verses.verse: I write these things to you who believe in the name of the Son of God so that you may know that you have eternal life.

verses.title: Assured of having eternal life
verses.verse: I tell you the truth, he who believes has everlasting life.

verses.title: Forgiveness of sin
verses.verse: In him we have redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of sins, in accordance with the riches of God's grace

verses.title: Forgiveness of sin
verses.verse: Therefore, there is now no condemnation for those who are in Christ Jesus,

verses.title: Justified
verses.verse: and are justified freely by his grace through the redemption that came by Christ Jesus.

verses.title: Justified
verses.verse: Therefore, since we have been justified through faith, we    have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ,

verses.title: Born again in Christ
verses.verse: Praise be to the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! In his great mercy he has given us new birth into a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead,

verses.title: Born again in Christ
verses.verse: he saved us, not because of righteous things we had done, but because of his mercy. He saved us through the washing of rebirth and renewal by the Holy Spirit,

verses.title: Being children of God
verses.verse: You are all sons of God through faith in Christ Jesus,

verses.title: Being children of God
verses.verse: because those who are led by the Spirit of God are sons of God.

verses.title: Holy Spirit living in Believers
verses.verse: You, however, are controlled not by the sinful nature but by the Spirit, if the Spirit of God lives in you. And if anyone does not have the Spirit of Christ, he does not belong to Christ.

verses.title: Holy Spirit living in Believers
verses.verse: And I will ask the Father, and he will give you another Counselor to be with you forever--   the Spirit of truth. The world cannot accept him, because it neither sees him nor knows him. But you know him, for he lives with you and will be in you.

verses.title: Salvation never to be lost
verses.verse: I give them eternal life, and they shall never perish; no one can snatch them out of my hand.   My Father, who has given them to me, is greater than all ; no one can snatch them out of my Father's hand.

verses.title: Salvation never to be lost
verses.verse: neither height nor depth, nor anything else in all creation, will be able to separate us from the love of God that is in Christ Jesus our Lord.

verses.title: Assurance based on the Word
verses.verse: For you have been born again, not of perishable seed, but of imperishable, through the living and enduring word of God.

verses.title: Assurance based on the Word
verses.verse: And you also were included in Christ when you heard the word of truth, the gospel of your salvation. Having believed, you were marked in him with a seal, the promised Holy Spirit,

verses.title: God wants to fellowship with us
verses.verse: God, who has called you into fellowship with his Son Jesus Christ our Lord, is faithful.

verses.title: God wants to fellowship with us
verses.verse: Yet the Lord longs to be gracious to you; he rises to show you compassion. For the Lord is a God of justice. Blessed are all who wait for him!

verses.title: God's command
verses.verse: Seek the LORD while he may be found; call on him while he is near.

verses.title: God's command
verses.verse: My heart says of you, "Seek his    face!" Your face, LORD, I will seek.

verses.title: Promise of blessings
verses.verse: "I am the vine; you are the branches. If a man remains in me and I in him, he will bear much fruit; apart from me you can do nothing.

verses.title: Promise of blessings
verses.verse: The lions may grow weak and hungry, but those who seek the LORD lack no good thing.

verses.title: To discern and obey God's will
verses.verse: I will stand at my watch and station myself on the ramparts; I will look to see what he will say to me, and what answer I am to give to this complaint.

verses.title: To discern and obey God's will
verses.verse: Let the morning bring me word of your unfailing love, for I have put my trust in you. Show me the way I should go, for to you I lift up my soul. Teach me to do your will, for you are my God; may your good Spirit lead me on level ground.

verses.title: Looking on the Lord
verses.verse: Let us fix our eyes on Jesus, the author and perfecter of our faith, who for the joy set before him endured the cross, scorning its shame, and sat down at the right hand of the throne of God.

verses.title: Looking on the Lord
verses.verse: Why are you downcast, O my soul? Why so disturbed within me? Put your hope in God, for I will yet praise him, my Savior and my God.

verses.title: Coming to the Lord with thirst
verses.verse: As the deer pants for streams of water, so my soul pants for you, O God.

verses.title: Coming to the Lord with thirst
verses.verse: I wait for the Lord , my soul waits, and in his word I put my hope.   My soul waits for the Lord more than watchmen wait for the morning, more than watchmen wait for the morning.

verses.title: Casting our burdens on the Lord
verses.verse: Cast your cares on the LORD and he will sustain you; he will never let the righteous fall.

verses.title: Casting our burdens on the Lord
verses.verse: Praise be to the Lord, to God our Savior, who daily bears our burdens. Selah

verses.title: Taking refuge and rest in the Lord
verses.verse: If you make the Most High your dwelling-- even the LORD, who is my refuge-- then no harm will befall you, no disaster will come near your tent.

verses.title: Taking refuge and rest in the Lord
verses.verse: "Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.   Take my yoke upon you and learn from me, for I am gentle and humble in heart, and you will find rest for your souls.

verses.title: Meeting the Lord in the Word and prayer
verses.verse: I rise before dawn and cry for help; I have put my hope in your word. My eyes stay open through the watches of the night, that I may meditate on your promises.

verses.title: Meeting the Lord in the Word and prayer
verses.verse: In the morning, O LORD, you hear my voice; in the morning I lay my requests before you and wait in expectation.

verses.title: Worshiping the Lord
verses.verse: Come, let us bow down in worship, let us kneel before the LORD our Maker;

verses.title: Worshiping the Lord
verses.verse: Through Jesus, therefore, let us continually offer to God a sacrifice of praise--the fruit of lips that confess his name.

verses.title: Getting daily satisfaction
verses.verse: Satisfy us in the morning with your unfailing love, that we may sing for joy and be glad all our days.

verses.title: Getting daily satisfaction
verses.verse: for he satisfies the thirsty and fills the hungry with good things.

verses.title: Jesus - praying very early in the morning
verses.verse: Very early in the morning, while it was still dark, Jesus got up, left the house and went off to a solitary place, where he prayed.

verses.title: Moses - personal fellowship wtih the Lord
verses.verse: The Lord would speak to Moses face to face, as a man speaks with his friend. Then Moses would return to the camp, but his young aide Joshua son of Nun did not leave the tent.

verses.title: Daniel - giving top priority to the fellowship
verses.verse: Now when Daniel learned that the decree had been published, he went home to his upstairs room where the windows opened toward Jerusalem. Three times a day he got down on his knees and prayed, giving thanks to his God, just as he had done before.

verses.title: Disciples - understanding the Word when alone with Jesus
verses.verse: He did not say anything to them without using a parable. But when he was alone with his own disciples, he explained everything.

verses.title: Inspired by God
verses.verse: All Scripture is God-breathed and is useful for teaching, rebuking, correcting and training in righteousness,

verses.title: Inspired by God
verses.verse: For prophecy never had its origin in the will of man, but men spoke from God as they were carried along by the Holy Spirit.

verses.title: Standing forever and never changing
verses.verse: Heaven and earth will pass away, but my words will never pass away.

verses.title: Standing forever and never changing
verses.verse: For, "All men are like grass, and all their glory is like the flowers of the field; the grass withers and the flowers fall, but the word of the Lord stands forever."    And this is the word that was preached to you.

verses.title: Being the truth
verses.verse: Sanctify    them by the truth; your word is truth.

verses.title: Being the truth
verses.verse: O Sovereign Lord , you are God! Your words are trustworthy, and you have promised these good things to your servant.

verses.title: Having power
verses.verse: "Is not my word like fire," declares the LORD, "and like a hammer that breaks a rock in pieces?

verses.title: Having power
verses.verse: for which I am suffering even to the point of being chained like a criminal. But God's word is not chained.

verses.title: Jesus also confirmed the Word
verses.verse: Jesus answered, "It is written: `Man does not live on bread alone, but on every word that comes from the mouth of God.'   "

verses.title: Jesus also confirmed the Word
verses.verse: And beginning with Moses and all the Prophets, he explained to them what was said in all the Scriptures concerning himself.

verses.title: Making us born again
verses.verse: For you have been born again, not of perishable seed, but of imperishable, through the living and enduring word of God.

verses.title: Making us born again
verses.verse: He chose to give us birth through the word of truth, that we might be a kind of firstfruits of all he created.

verses.title: Helping us grow up
verses.verse: Like newborn babies, crave pure spiritual milk, so that by it you may grow up in your salvation,

verses.title: Helping us grow up
verses.verse: "Now I commit you to God and to the word of his grace, which can build you up and give you an inheritance among all those who are sanctified.

verses.title: Giving guidance
verses.verse: Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light for my path.

verses.title: Giving guidance
verses.verse: When you walk, they will guide you; when you sleep, they will watch over you; when you awake, they will speak to you.   For these commands are a lamp, this teaching is a light, and the corrections of discipline are the way to life,

verses.title: Solving problems
verses.verse: He sent forth his word and healed them; he rescued them from the grave.

verses.title: Solving problems
verses.verse: The centurion replied, "Lord, I do not deserve to have you come under my roof. But just say the word, and my servant will be healed.

verses.title: Being our joy and delight
verses.verse: When your words came, I ate them; they were my joy and my heart's delight, for I bear your name, O LORD God Almighty.

verses.title: Being our joy and delight
verses.verse: Your statutes are my heritage forever; they are the joy of my heart.

verses.title: Being spiritual weapons
verses.verse: Take the helmet of salvation and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God.

verses.title: Being spiritual weapons
verses.verse: For the word of God is living and active. Sharper than any double-edged sword, it penetrates even to dividing soul and spirit, joints and marrow; it judges the thoughts and attitudes of the heart.

verses.title: Search the Word every day
verses.verse: Now the Bereans were of more noble character than the Thessalonians, for they received the message with great eagerness and examined the Scriptures every day to see if what Paul said was true.

verses.title: Meditate on the Word all day long
verses.verse: Oh, how I love your law! I meditate on it all day long.

verses.title: Obey the Word before teaching
verses.verse: For Ezra had devoted himself to the study and observance of the Law of the LORD, and to teaching its decrees and laws in Israel.

verses.title: Treasure the Word more than daily bread
verses.verse: I have not departed from the commands of his lips; I have treasured the words of his mouth more than my daily bread.

verses.title: Trust and obey the Word
verses.verse: Simon answered, "Master, we've worked hard all night and haven't caught anything. But because you say so, I will let down the nets." When they had done so, they caught such a large number of fish that their nets began to break.

verses.title: Hearing
verses.verse: Consequently, faith comes from hearing the message, and the message is heard through the word of Christ.

verses.title: Hearing
verses.verse: He replied, "Blessed rather are those who hear the word of God and obey it."

verses.title: Reading
verses.verse: Blessed is the one who reads the words of this prophecy, and blessed are those who hear it and take to heart what is written in it, because the time is near.

verses.title: Reading
verses.verse: It is to be with him, and he is to read it all the days of his life so that he may learn to revere the LORD his God and follow carefully all the words of this law and these decrees

verses.title: Studying
verses.verse: Now the Bereans were of more noble character than the Thessalonians, for they received the message with great eagerness and examined the Scriptures every day to see if what Paul said was true.

verses.title: Studying
verses.verse: Do your best to present yourself to God as one approved, a workman who does not need to be ashamed and who correctly handles the word of truth.

verses.title: Memorizing
verses.verse: These commandments that I give you today are to be upon your hearts.

verses.title: Memorizing
verses.verse: My son, keep my words and store up my commands within you.   Keep my commands and you will live; guard my teachings as the apple of your eye.   Bind them on your fingers; write them on the tablet of your heart.

verses.title: Meditating
verses.verse: Blessed is the man who does not walk in the counsel of the wicked or stand in the way of sinners or sit in the seat of mockers. But his delight is in the law of the LORD, and on his law he meditates day and night.

verses.title: Meditating
verses.verse: Do not let this Book of the Law depart from your mouth; meditate on it day and night, so that you may be careful to do everything written in it. Then you will be prosperous and successful.

verses.title: The Blood of Christ
verses.verse: But now in Christ Jesus you who once were far away have been brought near through the blood of Christ.

verses.title: The Blood of Christ
verses.verse: and through him to reconcile to himself all things, whether things on earth or things in heaven, by making peace through his blood, shed on the cross.

verses.title: God - The Father, The Son, The Holy Spirit
verses.verse: We proclaim to you what we have seen and heard, so that you also may have fellowship with us. And our fellowship is with the Father and with his Son, Jesus Christ.

verses.title: God - The Father, The Son, The Holy Spirit
verses.verse: May the grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, and the love of God, and the fellowship of the Holy Spirit be with you all.

verses.title: Promise of being with us
verses.verse: For where two or three come together in my name, there am I with them."

verses.title: Bestowing His blessings
verses.verse: How good and pleasant it is when brothers live together in unity!   It is like precious oil poured on the head, running down on the beard, running down on Aaron's beard, down upon the collar of his robes.   It is as if the dew of Hermon were falling on Mount Zion. For there the Lord bestows his blessing, even life forevermore.

verses.title: Protection against sins
verses.verse: But encourage one another daily, as long as it is called Today, so that none of you may be hardened by sin's deceitfulness.

verses.title: Helping up each other
verses.verse: Two are better than one, because they have a good return for their work:   If one falls down, his friend can help him up. But pity the man who falls and has no one to help him up!

verses.title: Training in godly life
verses.verse: Flee the evil desires of youth, and pursue righteousness, faith, love and peace, along with those who call on the Lord out of a pure heart.

verses.title: Developing godly character
verses.verse: As iron sharpens iron, so one man sharpens another.  As water reflects a face, so a man's heart reflects the man.

verses.title: Getting God's wisdom
verses.verse: He who walks with the wise grows wise, but a companion of fools suffers harm.

verses.title: Attaining maturity
verses.verse: until we all reach unity in the faith and in the knowledge of the Son of God and become mature, attaining to the whole measure of the fullness of Christ.

verses.title: Fruitful in the ministry
verses.verse: They devoted themselves to the apostles' teaching and to the fellowship, to the breaking of bread and to prayer. praising God and enjoying the favor of all the people. And the Lord added to their number daily those who were being saved.

verses.title: Partnering in the gospel
verses.verse: because of your partnership in the gospel from the first day until now, Whatever happens, conduct yourselves in a manner worthy of the gospel of Christ. Then, whether I come and see you or only hear about you in my absence, I will know that you stand firm in one spirit, contending as one man for the faith of the gospel

verses.title: Spurring one another
verses.verse: And let us consider how we may spur one another on toward love and good deeds. Let us not give up meeting together, as some are in the habit of doing, but let us encourage one another--and all the more as you see the Day approaching.

verses.title: Meeting the needs
verses.verse: For I testify that they gave as much as they were able, and even beyond their ability. Entirely on their own,   they urgently pleaded with us for the privilege of sharing in this service to the saints.

verses.title: Participating in the sufferings of Christ
verses.verse: But rejoice that you participate in the sufferings of Christ, so that you may be overjoyed when his glory is revealed.

verses.title: Carrying each other's burdens
verses.verse: Carry each other's burdens, and in this way you will fulfill the law of Christ.

verses.title: Be like-minded
verses.verse: If you have any encouragement from being united with Christ, if any comfort from his love, if any fellowship with the Spirit, if any tenderness and compassion, then make my joy complete by being like-minded, having the same love, being one in spirit and purpose.

verses.title: Be humble
verses.verse: Do nothing out of selfish ambition or vain conceit, but in humility consider others better than yourselves. Each of you should look not only to your own interests, but also to the interests of others.

verses.title: Open your heart wide
verses.verse: We are not withholding our affection from you, but you are withholding yours from us. As a fair exchange--I speak as to my children--open wide your hearts also.

verses.title: Submit to one another
verses.verse: Submit to one another out of reverence for Christ.

verses.title: Do not compare with others
verses.verse: But they kept quiet because on the way they had argued about who was the greatest.   Sitting down, Jesus called the Twelve and said, "If anyone wants to be first, he must be the very last, and the servant of all."

verses.title: Let no bitter root grow up
verses.verse: See to it that no one misses the grace of God and that no bitter root grows up to cause trouble and defile many.

verses.title: Part from the fruitless things
verses.verse: Have nothing to do with the fruitless deeds of darkness, but rather expose them.

verses.title: Be available
verses.verse: No one serving as a soldier gets involved in civilian affairs--he wants to please his commanding officer.

verses.title: In relation to believers
verses.verse: "Therefore, if you are offering your gift at the altar and there remember that your brother has something against you,   leave your gift there in front of the altar. First go and be reconciled to your brother; then come and offer your gift.

verses.title: In relation to believers
verses.verse: "If your brother sins against you,    go and show him his fault, just between the two of you. If he listens to you, you have won your brother over.

verses.title: In relation to God
verses.verse: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just and will forgive us our sins and purify us from all unrighteousness.

verses.title: In relation to God
verses.verse: He who conceals his sins does not prosper, but whoever confesses and renounces them finds mercy.

verses.title: Every Christian
verses.verse: But you will receive power when the Holy Spirit comes on you; and you will be my witnesses in Jerusalem, and in all Judea and Samaria, and to the ends of the earth."

verses.title: Every Christian
verses.verse: All this is from God, who reconciled us to himself through Christ and gave us the ministry of reconciliation:   that God was reconciling the world to himself in Christ, not counting men's sins against them. And he has committed to us the message of reconciliation.

verses.title: God's command
verses.verse: In the presence of God and of Christ Jesus, who will judge the living and the dead, and in view of his appearing and his kingdom, I give you this charge:   Preach the Word; be prepared in season and out of season; correct, rebuke and encourage--with great patience and careful instruction.

verses.title: Love for the lost
verses.verse: For the Son of Man came to seek and to save what was lost."

verses.title: God's commission
verses.verse: On the contrary, we speak as men approved by God to be entrusted with the gospel. We are not trying to please men but God, who tests our hearts.

verses.title: Compelling role
verses.verse: Yet when I preach the gospel, I cannot boast, for I am compelled to preach. Woe to me if I do not preach the gospel!

verses.title: No preaching, no believing
verses.verse: How, then, can they call on the one they have not believed in? And how can they believe in the one of whom they have not heard? And how can they hear without someone preaching to them?

verses.title: God wants all men to be saved
verses.verse: This is good, and pleases God our Savior, who wants all men to be saved and to come to a knowledge of the truth.

verses.title: God's great concern for men
verses.verse: But the LORD said, "You have been concerned about this vine, though you did not tend it or make it grow. It sprang up overnight and died overnight. But Nineveh has more than a hundred and twenty thousand people who cannot tell their right hand from their left, and many cattle as well. Should I not be concerned about that great city?" 

verses.title: God rejoices over one sinner's repentance
verses.verse: I tell you that in the same way there will be more rejoicing in heaven over one sinner who repents than over ninety-nine righteous persons who do not need to repent.

verses.title: To have blessed fellowship in the Lord
verses.verse: We proclaim to you what we have seen and heard, so that you also may have fellowship with us. And our fellowship is with the Father and with his Son, Jesus Christ.

verses.title: Promise for everlasting glory
verses.verse: Those who are wise    will shine like the brightness of the heavens, and those who lead many to righteousness, like the stars for ever and ever.

verses.title: Follow Jesus first
verses.verse: "Come, follow me," Jesus said, "and I will make you fishers of men."

verses.title: Live a life of good testimony
verses.verse: so that you may become blameless and pure, children of God without fault in a crooked and depraved generation, in which you shine like stars in the universe as you hold out    the word of life--in order that I may boast on the day of Christ that I did not run or labor for nothing.

verses.title: Pray for people
verses.verse: Pray also for me, that whenever I open my mouth, words may be given me so that I will fearlessly make known the mystery of the gospel,

verses.title: Be prepared to answer
verses.verse: But in your hearts set apart Christ as Lord. Always be prepared to give an answer to everyone who asks you to give the reason for the hope that you have. But do this with gentleness and respect,

verses.title: Share your testimony
verses.verse: Many of the Samaritans from that town believed in him because of the woman's testimony, "He told me everything I ever did."

verses.title: Believe in the power of the Word
verses.verse: For the word of God is living and active. Sharper than any double-edged sword, it penetrates even to dividing soul and spirit, joints and marrow; it judges the thoughts and attitudes of the heart.

verses.title: The Word preached never returns in vain
verses.verse: so is my word that goes out from my mouth: It will not return to me empty, but will accomplish what I desire and achieve the purpose for which I sent it.

verses.title: Focus on Jesus Christ when witnessing
verses.verse: but we preach Christ crucified: a stumbling block to Jews and foolishness to Gentiles, but to those whom God has called, both Jews and Greeks, Christ the power of God and the wisdom of God.

verses.title: Witness in power and conviction
verses.verse: because our gospel came to you not simply with words, but also with power, with the Holy Spirit and with deep conviction. You know how we lived among you for your sake.

verses.title: Help them receive Jesus Christ
verses.verse: That if you confess with your mouth, "Jesus is Lord," and believe in your heart that God raised him from the dead, you will be saved. For it is with your heart that you believe and are justified, and it is with your mouth that you confess and are saved.

verses.title: Encourage them not to delay the decision
verses.verse: For he says, "In the time of my favor I heard you, and in the day of salvation I helped you."    I tell you, now is the time of God's favor, now is the day of salvation.

verses.title: Help them be assured of their salvation
verses.verse: Examine yourselves to see whether you are in the faith; test yourselves. Do you not realize that Christ Jesus is in you--unless, of course, you fail the test?

verses.title: Have an evangelical Bible Study
verses.verse: As his custom was, Paul went into the synagogue, and on three Sabbath days he reasoned with them from the Scriptures,   explaining and proving that the Christ had to suffer and rise from the dead. "This Jesus I am proclaiming to you is the Christ, " he said.

verses.title: Paul
verses.verse: However, I consider my life worth nothing to me, if only I may finish the race and complete the task the Lord Jesus has given me--the task of testifying to the gospel of God's grace.

verses.title: Philip
verses.verse: The Spirit told Philip, "Go to that chariot and stay near it." Then Philip ran up to the chariot and heard the man reading Isaiah the prophet. "Do you understand what you are reading?" Philip asked.

verses.title: Peter and John
verses.verse: For we cannot help speaking about what we have seen and heard."

verses.title: Created in His own image
verses.verse: So God created man in his own image, in the image of God he created him; male and female he created them.

verses.title: Separated from God by our sin
verses.verse: Surely the arm of the LORD is not too short to save, nor his ear too dull to hear. But your iniquities have separated you from your God; your sins have hidden his face from you, so that he will not hear.

verses.title: Man's condition - Sinner
verses.verse: Therefore, just as sin entered the world through one man, and death through sin, and in this way death came to all men, because all sinned--

verses.title: Man's condition - Sinner
verses.verse: for all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God,

verses.title: Man's condition - Judgment
verses.verse: Just as man is destined to die once, and after that to face judgment,

verses.title: Man's condition - Judgment
verses.verse: He will punish those who do not know God and do not obey the gospel of our Lord Jesus.   They will be punished with everlasting destruction and shut out from the presence of the Lord and from the majesty of his power

verses.title: Man's condition - Eternal death
verses.verse: For the wages of sin is death, but the gift of God is eternal life in    Christ Jesus our Lord.

verses.title: Man's condition - Eternal death
verses.verse: But the cowardly, the unbelieving, the vile, the murderers, the sexually immoral, those who practice magic arts, the idolaters and all liars--their place will be in the fiery lake of burning sulfur. This is the second death."

verses.title: Salvation not by ourselves - Works
verses.verse: For it is by grace you have been saved, through faith--and this not from yourselves, it is the gift of God-- not by works, so that no one can boast.

verses.title: Salvation not by ourselves - Works
verses.verse: I do not set aside the grace of God, for if righteousness could be gained through the law, Christ died for nothing!"

verses.title: Salvation not by ourselves - Religion
verses.verse: Salvation is found in no one else, for there is no other name under heaven given to men by which we must be saved."

verses.title: Salvation not by ourselves - Money
verses.verse: For you know that it was not with perishable things such as silver or gold that you were redeemed from the empty way of life handed down to you from your forefathers,

verses.title: Salvation not by ourselves - Miracles and wonders
verses.verse: Jews demand miraculous signs and Greeks look for wisdom, but we preach Christ crucified: a stumbling block to Jews and foolishness to Gentiles,

verses.title: Salvation not by ourselves - Wisdom
verses.verse: For since in the wisdom of God the world through its wisdom did not know him, God was pleased through the foolishness of what was preached to save those who believe.

verses.title: Salvation not by ourselves - Philosophy and tradition
verses.verse: See to it that no one takes you captive through hollow and deceptive philosophy, which depends on human tradition and the basic principles of this world rather than on Christ.

verses.title: Salvation not by ourselves - Natural descent
verses.verse: children born not of natural descent,    nor of human decision or a husband's will, but born of God.

verses.title: Salvation not by ourselves - The flesh counts for nothing
verses.verse: Flesh gives birth to flesh, but the Spirit    gives birth to spirit. You should not be surprised at my saying, `You    must be born again.'

verses.title: Salvation not by ourselves - The flesh counts for nothing
verses.verse: The Spirit gives life; the flesh counts for nothing. The words I have spoken to you are spirit    and they are life.

verses.title: God's solution - Bridge bringing us to God
verses.verse: For Christ died for sins once for all, the righteous for the unrighteous, to bring you to God. He was put to death in the body but made alive by the Spirit,

verses.title: God's solution - God gave His only begotten Son
verses.verse: "For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son,    that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.

verses.title: God's solution - Jesus died for our sin
verses.verse: But God demonstrates his own love for us in this: While we were still sinners, Christ died for us.

verses.title: God's solution - Jesus resurrected
verses.verse: For what I received I passed on to you as of first importance : that Christ died for our sins according to the Scriptures,   that he was buried, that he was raised on the third day according to the Scriptures,

verses.title: God's solution - Forgiving us all our sins
verses.verse: When you were dead in your sins and in the uncircumcision of your sinful nature, God made you alive with Christ. He forgave us all our sins,

verses.title: Man must - hear and believe
verses.verse: "I tell you the truth, whoever hears my word and believes him who sent me has eternal life and will not be condemned; he has crossed over from death to life.

verses.title: Man must - Receive Jesus
verses.verse: Yet to all who received him, to those who believed in his name, he gave the right to become children of God--

verses.title: Man must - Receive Jesus
verses.verse: Here I am! I stand at the door and knock. If anyone hears my voice and opens the door, I will come in and eat with him, and he with me.

verses.title: Man must - Pray to receive Jesus
verses.verse: That if you confess with your mouth, "Jesus is Lord," and believe in your heart that God raised him from the dead, you will be saved. For it is with your heart that you believe and are justified, and it is with your mouth that you confess and are saved.

verses.title: The Creator
verses.verse: He was with God in the beginning. Through him all things were made; without him nothing was made that has been made.

verses.title: The Lord of all creation
verses.verse: For by him all things were created: things in heaven and on earth, visible and invisible, whether thrones or powers or rulers or authorities; all things were created by him and for him. He is before all things, and in him all things hold together.

verses.title: The head of Church
verses.verse: And he is the head of the body, the church; he is the beginning and the firstborn from among the dead, so that in everything he might have the supremacy.

verses.title: Far above all power
verses.verse: far above all rule and authority, power and dominion, and every title that can be given, not only in the present age but also in the one to come.

verses.title: The Lord of everyone
verses.verse: that at the name of Jesus every knee should bow, in heaven and on earth and under the earth, and every tongue confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.

verses.title: The Lord of both the dead and the living
verses.verse: For this very reason, Christ died and returned to life so that he might be the Lord of both the dead and the living.

verses.title: Bought with Christ's life price
verses.verse: Do you not know that your body is a temple of the Holy Spirit, who is in you, whom you have received from God? You are not your own; you were bought at a price. Therefore honor God with your body.

verses.title: Make the decision of commitment to the Lordship
verses.verse: And he died for all, that those who live should no longer live for themselves but for him who died for them and was raised again.

verses.title: Satisfying all our needs
verses.verse: But seek first his kingdom and his righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well.

verses.title: Abundant reward
verses.verse: "I tell you the truth," Jesus replied, "no one who has left home or brothers or sisters or mother or father or children or fields for me and the gospel will fail to receive a hundred times as much in this present age (homes, brothers, sisters, mothers, children and fields--and with them, persecutions) and in the age to come, eternal life.

verses.title: Giving His promise
verses.verse: and said, "I swear by myself, declares the LORD, that because you have done this and have not withheld your son, your only son, I will surely bless you and make your descendants as numerous as the stars in the sky and as the sand on the seashore. Your descendants will take possession of the cities of their enemies,

verses.title: Accompanying us
verses.verse: "And you, my son Solomon, acknowledge the God of your father, and serve him with wholehearted devotion and with a willing mind, for the LORD searches every heart and understands every motive behind the thoughts. If you seek him, he will be found by you; but if you forsake him, he will reject you forever.

verses.title: Giving His power
verses.verse: For the eyes of the LORD range throughout the earth to strengthen those whose hearts are fully committed to him. You have done a foolish thing, and from now on you will be at war."

verses.title: Protecting us
verses.verse: "Because he loves me," says the LORD, "I will rescue him; I will protect him, for he acknowledges my name.

verses.title: Honoring us
verses.verse: "Therefore the LORD, the God of Israel, declares: `I promised that your house and your father's house would minister before me forever.' But now the LORD declares: `Far be it from me! Those who honor me I will honor, but those who despise me will be disdained.

verses.title: Self
verses.verse: Then he said to them all: "If anyone would come after me, he must deny himself and take up his cross daily and follow me.

verses.title: Relationship with others
verses.verse: When a man's ways are pleasing to the LORD, he makes even his enemies live at peace with him.

verses.title: Life paths
verses.verse: Trust in the LORD with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding; in all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make your paths straight.

verses.title: Worldly desires
verses.verse: You were taught, with regard to your former way of life, to put off your old self, which is being corrupted by its deceitful desires; to be made new in the attitude of your minds; and to put on the new self, created to be like God in true righteousness and holiness.

verses.title: Lusts
verses.verse: Flee the evil desires of youth, and pursue righteousness, faith, love and peace, along with those who call on the Lord out of a pure heart.

verses.title: Possessions
verses.verse: For we brought nothing into the world, and we can take nothing out of it. But if we have food and clothing, we will be content with that. People who want to get rich fall into temptation and a trap and into many foolish and harmful desires that plunge men into ruin and destruction.

verses.title: Time managing
verses.verse: Be very careful, then, how you live--not as unwise but as wise, making the most of every opportunity, because the days are evil.

verses.title: God's calling
verses.verse: Without delay he called them, and they left their father Zebedee in the boat with the hired men and followed him.

verses.title: Paul
verses.verse: I eagerly expect and hope that I will in no way be ashamed, but will have sufficient courage so that now as always Christ will be exalted in my body, whether by life or by death.

verses.title: Timothy
verses.verse: For everyone looks out for his own interests, not those of Jesus Christ. But you know that Timothy has proved himself, because as a son with his father he has served with me in the work of the gospel.

verses.title: Our faith fathers
verses.verse: Some faced jeers and flogging, while still others were chained and put in prison. They were stoned   ; they were sawed in two; they were put to death by the sword. They went about in sheepskins and goatskins, destitute, persecuted and mistreated-- the world was not worthy of them. They wandered in deserts and mountains, and in caves and holes in the ground.

verses.title: God's concern and promise for the world
verses.verse: "I will make you into a great nation and I will bless you; I will make your name great, and you will be a blessing. I will bless those who bless you, and whoever curses you I will curse; and all peoples on earth will be blessed through you."

verses.title: God's concern and promise for the world
verses.verse: he says: "It is too small a thing for you to be my servant to restore the tribes of Jacob and bring back those of Israel I have kept. I will also make you a light for the Gentiles, that you may bring my salvation to the ends of the earth."

verses.title: Great Commission
verses.verse: Therefore go and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit,   and teaching them to obey everything I have commanded you. And surely I am with you always, to the very end of the age."

verses.title: Great Commission
verses.verse: But you will receive power when the Holy Spirit comes on you; and you will be my witnesses in Jerusalem, and in all Judea and Samaria, and to the ends of the earth."

verses.title: Commit yourself to the mission
verses.verse: Then I heard the voice of the Lord saying, "Whom shall I send? And who will go for us?" And I said, "Here am I. Send me!"

verses.title: Commit yourself to the mission
verses.verse: to be a minister of Christ Jesus to the Gentiles with the priestly duty of proclaiming the gospel of God, so that the Gentiles might become an offering acceptable to God, sanctified by the Holy Spirit.

verses.title: Pray for the world
verses.verse: Ask of me, and I will make the nations your inheritance, the ends of the earth your possession.

verses.title: Pray for the world
verses.verse: Be exalted, O God, above the heavens; let your glory be over all the earth.

verses.title: Preach the gospel
verses.verse: a faith and knowledge resting on the hope of eternal life, which God, who does not lie, promised before the beginning of time, and at his appointed season he brought his word to light through the preaching entrusted to me by the command of God our Savior,

verses.title: Preach the gospel
verses.verse: But the Lord stood at my side and gave me strength, so that through me the message might be fully proclaimed and all the Gentiles might hear it. And I was delivered from the lion's mouth.

verses.title: Help them grow in Christ
verses.verse: We proclaim him, admonishing and teaching everyone with all wisdom, so that we may present everyone perfect in Christ. To this end I labor, struggling with all his energy, which so powerfully works in me.

verses.title: Help them grow in Christ
verses.verse: And this is my prayer: that your love may abound more and more in knowledge and depth of insight, so that you may be able to discern what is best and may be pure and blameless until the day of Christ, filled with the fruit of righteousness that comes through Jesus Christ--to the glory and praise of God.

verses.title: Spiritual Multiplication
verses.verse: And the things you have heard me say in the presence of many witnesses entrust to reliable men who will also be qualified to teach others.

verses.title: Spiritual Multiplication
verses.verse: The least of you will become a thousand, the smallest a mighty nation. I am the LORD; in its time I will do this swiftly."

verses.title: Live a simple and wholehearted life
verses.verse: Therefore, since we are surrounded by such a great cloud of witnesses, let us throw off everything that hinders and the sin that so easily entangles, and let us run with perseverance the race marked out for us.

verses.title: Live a simple and wholehearted life
verses.verse: For the eyes of the LORD range throughout the earth to strengthen those whose hearts are fully committed to him. You have done a foolish thing, and from now on you will be at war."

verses.title: Glory of the mission finish
verses.verse: For the earth will be filled with the knowledge of the glory of the LORD, as the waters cover the sea.

verses.title: Glory of the mission finish
verses.verse: My name will be great among the nations, from the rising to the setting of the sun. In every place incense and pure offerings will be brought to my name, because my name will be great among the nations," says the Lord Almighty.
